Container.Name: archipelago-server
Container.Overview: Archipelago multiworld randomizer server. Generate your Archipelago world using the client then place your generated AP_*.zip in the output folder and start the container. This container will always use the latest *.zip file in the output folder.
Container.PostArgs: -c 'set -- /archipelago/Archipelago/output/AP_*.zip; [ -e "$1" ] || { echo No AP_*.zip found; ls -la /archipelago/Archipelago/output; exit 1; }; exec /archipelago/Archipelago/ArchipelagoServer "$1"'

Config.Name: Output Folder
Config.Description: Folder containing your AP_*.zip seed file
